form.formComment: Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at this track on March 5 over 274m, 1.0 len behind Mw Bcause Im Alive with 56kg at $3.30. Second-up got back early 8th of 10 at this track in G1 on March 21 over 274m, 3 len behind Big Rotney carrying 56kg at $24.80. Forward showing expected.
